From Stdlib           Require Import List.
From MetaRocq.Common  Require Import BasicAst Kernames Universes.
From MetaRocq.Utils   Require Import bytestring.
From MetaRocq.Erasure Require Import EAst.
From Agda2Lambox     Require Import CheckWF Eval.
Import ListNotations.

Definition env : global_declarations :=
  [((MPfile ["With"%bs], "test"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tApp
                   (tApp (tConst (MPfile ["With"%bs], "filter"%bs)) tBox)
                   (tLambda nAnon (tRel 0)))
                (tConst (MPfile ["With"%bs], "xs"%bs))) |});
   ((MPfile ["With"%bs], "xs"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tApp
                   (tConstruct
                      {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                         inductive_ind := 0 |}
                      1 [])
                   (tConstruct
                      {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                         inductive_ind := 0 |}
                      0 []))
                (tApp
                   (tApp
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         1 [])
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         1 []))
                   (tApp
                      (tApp
                         (tConstruct
                            {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |}
                            1 [])
                         (tConstruct
                            {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |}
                            0 []))
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         0 [])))) |});
   ((MPfile ["With"%bs], "filter"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tFix
                [{| dname := nNamed "filter"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tLambda
                           nAnon
                           (tLambda
                              nAnon
                              (tCase
                                 ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                                     inductive_ind := 0 |},
                                  0)
                                 (tRel 0)
                                 [([],
                                   tConstruct
                                     {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs);
                                        inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                     0 []);
                                  ([nAnon; nAnon],
                                   tApp
                                     (tApp
                                        (tApp
                                           (tApp
                                              (tApp
                                                 (tLambda
                                                    nAnon
                                                    (tLambda
                                                       nAnon
                                                       (tLambda
                                                          nAnon
                                                          (tLambda
                                                             nAnon
                                                             (tLambda
                                                                nAnon
                                                                (tCase
                                                                   ({| inductive_mind :=
                                                                         (MPfile ["With"%bs],
                                                                          "Bool"%bs);
                                                                       inductive_ind := 0 |},
                                                                    0)
                                                                   (tRel 1)
                                                                   [([],
                                                                     tApp
                                                                       (tApp
                                                                          (tApp (tRel 10) tBox)
                                                                          (tRel 3))
                                                                       (tRel 0));
                                                                    ([],
                                                                     tApp
                                                                       (tApp
                                                                          (tConstruct
                                                                             {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                  (MPfile
                                                                                     ["With"%bs],
                                                                                   "List"%bs);
                                                                                inductive_ind :=
                                                                                  0 |}
                                                                             1 [])
                                                                          (tRel 2))
                                                                       (tApp
                                                                          (tApp
                                                                             (tApp (tRel 10) tBox)
                                                                             (tRel 3))
                                                                          (tRel 0)))]))))))
                                                 (tRel 4))
                                              (tRel 3))
                                           (tRel 1))
                                        (tApp (tRel 3) (tRel 1)))
                                     (tRel 0))])));
                    rarg := 0 |}]
                0) |});
   ((MPfile ["With"%bs], "List"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "List"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [{| cstr_name := "\1366\&5b\1366\1366\&5d\1366"%bs;
                     cstr_nargs := 0 |};
                  {| cstr_name := "\1366_\1366\&3a\1366\1366\&3a\1366_"%bs;
                     cstr_nargs := 2 |}];
               ind_projs := [] |}] |});
   ((MPfile ["With"%bs], "Bool"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Bool"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [{| cstr_name := "r#false"%bs; cstr_nargs := 0 |};
                  {| cstr_name := "r#true"%bs; cstr_nargs := 0 |}];
               ind_projs := [] |}] |});
   ((MPfile ["LamBox"%bs], "Empty"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Empty"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny; ind_ctors := []; ind_projs := [] |}] |})].

Compute @check_wf_glob eflags env.

Definition prog1 : program :=
  (env, tConst (MPfile ["With"%bs], "test"%bs)).

Compute eval_program prog1.
